title: REQUEST - Chrome Tab Icon Matches "Main Menu Logo"
excerpt: I manage 6 Monday.com environments.  It is very hard to find the environment to click on as all 6 have the same time icon, instead of using my Menu logo.

posts.author: scottschindler (Michael Scott Schindler)
posts.cookedHtml: I manage 6 Monday.com environments. It is very hard to find the environment to click on as all 6 have the same time icon, instead of using my Menu logo.
